# Mayank Panchal — Full Stack Developer

> Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience shipping production web applications end-to-end. Next.js / React.js on the frontend, Python (FastAPI + PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy) on the backend. Comfortable owning features from database schema through to deployed UI, with hands-on Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and AWS EC2. Works daily with AI-augmented tooling (Cursor, Claude Code, Devin, Kiro, Antigravity, Copilot, ChatGPT, Ollama).

Site: https://portfoliobymayank.vercel.app
Contact: mayank.careers01@gmail.com · +91 96116 41801
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayankpanchal01
GitHub: https://github.com/munkpanchal

## Facts (structured, machine-readable)

- Name: Mayank Panchal
- Role: Full Stack Developer (Python / FastAPI · Next.js / React.js)
- Experience: 4+ years
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- Current employer: Screetract Solutions (Feb 2022 – Present)
- Career progression: Associate Software Engineer → Software Engineer → Senior Software Engineer → Lead Software Engineer
- Education: B.Tech Computer Science, Shobhit University (Aug 2018 – Sep 2022)
- Availability: Open to Full-Stack, Backend (FastAPI/Python), and AI-augmented engineering roles

## Core skills

- **Languages**: Python, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS
- **Backend**: FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, JWT Authentication, Celery, WebSockets
- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), React.js, Redux, Zustand, Context API, Tailwind CSS, GSAP
- **Data & Infra**: PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, AWS EC2, AWS S3, GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
- **AI Dev Tools**: Cursor, Claude Code, Devin (formerly Windsurf), Kiro, Antigravity, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Ollama
- **Tooling**: Git, GitHub, Webpack, Vite, Postman, Vercel, Linux, Linear
- **Architecture**: Component-Driven Development, Micro-Frontend, Responsive Design, Performance Optimization

## Selected impact

- Built and maintained 7+ full-stack applications (Next.js + FastAPI) with 99.9% uptime.
- Designed async REST APIs with FastAPI + Pydantic, backed by PostgreSQL models via SQLAlchemy ORM.
- Implemented JWT authentication with role-based access control across full-stack applications.
- Reduced feature development time by ~25% via a reusable Next.js + Tailwind component library.
- Improved Core Web Vitals by ~30% via lazy loading, code splitting, memoization, and bundle optimization.
- Containerized full-stack apps with Docker, deployed on AWS EC2 behind Nginx via GitHub Actions CI/CD.
- Grew from Associate to Lead Software Engineer at Screetract Solutions, heading 15+ projects.

## Selected projects

- [TaskFlow — Full-Stack Project & Task Management Platform](/projects/taskflow): Next.js (App Router) + async FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Redis/Celery + WebSockets, deployed on AWS EC2.
- [VLSID Conference Registration Portal](/projects/vlsid-conference-portal): 1,000+ attendees, zero downtime. React + Node.js.
- [CometLit — Literacy Learning Platform](/projects/cometlit-literacy-platform): Modular React learning platform on Netlify.
- [Spotify Clone](/projects/spotify-clone): React + Redux + GraphQL music streaming clone.
- [Quadometry Designs](/projects/quadometry-designs): Custom WordPress theme with GSAP animations.
- [Genesis Planners](/projects/genesis-planners): Custom WordPress theme for a 200+ staff architecture firm.
- [Reena Bapat Design Studio](/projects/reena-bapat-studio): Editorial WordPress theme.
